ideation: This sequence shows the robot using a screwdriver.  The animation will focus on the right arm, mimicking the turning motion of a screwdriver. The left arm will remain mostly still, providing a counterpoint to the focused action of the right arm. Frame 1 shows the robot holding the screwdriver, ready to turn. Frame 2 shows the robot beginning to twist the screwdriver, emphasizing the turning motion. Frame 3 shows the robot completing a full rotation of the screwdriver. Frame 4 shows the robot returning the screwdriver to its starting position. Frame 5 shows the robot returning to a neutral position.  The reasoning behind each frame is described in the parameters.

frames.beat: arms rest, right hand grips screwdriver
right arm begins to twist, turning the screw
a full turn of the screwdriver is completed
the screwdriver is returned to its starting position
robot returns to a neutral, resting pose
